differential_diagnoses: Metastatic malignancy with bone marrow infiltration (myelophthisis)
Occult primary adenocarcinoma (pancreatic or gastrointestinal origin)
next_steps: Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry, cytogenetics, and cultures
Comprehensive HLH diagnostic workup (soluble IL-2 receptor, triglycerides, fibrinogen)
PET-CT scan to identify primary tumor site and sites of metastatic disease
CT-guided biopsy of suspicious hepatic or lung nodules
Transfusion support tailored to clinical stability
Aggressive supportive care for acute pancreatitis and metabolic derangements
Early palliative care consultation to discuss goals of care
